data.title: Circle Reports Decrease in USDC Circulation Amid Recent Activity
data.description:
According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle has experienced a decrease in the circulation of its USDC stablecoin over the past week. Between May 8 and May 15, Circle issued approximately 29 billion USDC while redeeming around 37 billion USDC, resulting in a net reduction of about 8 billion USDC in circulation.

The total circulation of USDC now stands at 605 billion coins. Circle's reserves are reported to be approximately $607 billion, with $73 billion held in cash and $534 billion managed within the Circle Reserve Fund. This recent activity reflects ongoing adjustments in the stablecoin's market presence and reserve management.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin to Discuss Ethereum Consensus Layer Upgrade at ETH Beijing Hackathon
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin is set to remotely participate in the ETH Beijing Hackathon, where he will deliver a speech on the topic of 'Ethereum Consensus Layer Upgrade (Beam Chain).' The presentation is scheduled for May 17, 2025, at 2 PM UTC+8.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $260 million yesterday, continuing a net inflow for three consecutive days
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 16, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$260 million. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$130 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached US$45.553 billion. The second is Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net inflow of US$67.9492 million in a single day. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow in history has reached US$11.595 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$122.666 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.95%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$41.775 billion.

data.title: Oracle Red Bull Racing and Gate.io Launch Joint Digital Collectibles
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Oracle Red Bull Racing and Gate.io, the world's leading digital asset trading platform, officially released "IN THE MOMENT", a large-scale joint digital collection series tailored for the 2025 season.
This cooperation reproduces the classic moments in the history of Oracle Red Bull Racing in digital form for the first time, combined with the aesthetic theme of this year's REBL Car Culture, paying tribute to the team's spirit and track culture. The "IN THE MOMENT" project marks the first in-depth cooperation between the two parties in the field of Web3, aiming to connect global racing fans and digital asset enthusiasts, and build an immersive on-chain journey exclusively for F1 fans.
The entire series consists of 24 digital collections, 13 of which are created by 6 internationally renowned artists, and the remaining 11 are originally designed by Oracle Red Bull Racing. All collections are issued through the Gate.io platform and the technical support provided by Abstract, and are available in rare silver and gold versions.

data.title: Bitcoin Rally Hits Wall as Price Stalls Below $104K, Analyst Cites Derivatives Pressure
data.description:
Bitcoin experienced a notable surge earlier this week, climbing above the $104,000 mark and registering a weekly gain of nearly 10%. However, after reaching this level, the asset appears to have encountered resistance, with upward momentum slowing and price action remaining relatively flat in recent days. At the time of writing, BTC is trading at $103,663, reflecting a modest 1. 7% increase over the past 24 hours
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-rally-hits-wall-price-stalls-analyst-cites-derivatives-pressure/

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow in the U.S.
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from Farside Investors indicates that the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $22.2 million yesterday. Among the contributors, Fidelity's FETH saw an inflow of $13.6 million, while Grayscale's Mini ETH attracted $8.6 million.

data.title: Upbit's Trading Volume Experiences Significant Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CoinGecko data reveals that Upbit's trading volume reached $1.824 billion over the past 24 hours, marking a 39.1% decrease. The XRP/KRW trading pair accounted for 14.85% of the total volume, leading the Korean won trading market. Other top trading pairs include NXPC, ETH, BTC, and KAITO.

data.title: How Blockchain Technology Is Revolutionizing Data Security Across Industries
data.description:
Blockchain integration is transforming the way industries protect and manage data. Unlike traditional security systems, blockchain uses decentralized networks that make it nearly impossible to alter or hack information. This level of protection addresses growing cybersecurity threats that many organizations face today. By integrating blockchain, companies gain enhanced transparency, data integrity and trust
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/16/how-blockchain-technology-is-revolutionizing-data-security-across-industries/
